title: Acronia jupiter
taxonomy: Acronia jupiter is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the madder family. It belongs to the genus Acronia, which comprises several species of flowering plants native to Southeast Asia. Acronia jupiter is native to Myanmar and Thailand, where it grows in the wild. The plant is classified as a member of the Rubiaceae family due to its characteristic flowers and fruit. Acronia jupiter is a relatively rare species, and more research is needed to understand its classification and distribution.
